hero.headline: AI Product Platform for Founders and Companies
hero.subheadline: BIBO PLB helps launch products and services powered by artificial intelligence — from idea and MVP to a full working product system.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: Not just a contractor — a product platform
about.text: BIBO PLB combines expertise in AI, development, marketing, and product launch. We handle tasks end-to-end: as an external team or as part of your startup.
about.point1_text: We think in products, not tasks. Every decision is a hypothesis we test.
about.point2_text: From research to launch and growth. We don't hand off — we see it through.
about.point3_text: We build our own AI services. That's the best proof of our competence.

value.label: What we deliver
value.title: From idea to a working AI product
value.card1_text: AI products without hiring a large team. We start fast and test hypotheses in real conditions.
value.card2_text: Technology, marketing and product thinking in one team. No need to recruit separately.
value.card3_text: We draw on our own experience launching AI services, not just pitch decks.
value.card4_text: We work as a service partner or as part of your team — depending on the task.

models.label: Collaboration formats
models.title: Two ways to work together
models.service_text: BIBO PLB as a service company: we research the task, design the solution, develop the product or AI service, and help with launch and growth.
models.startup_text: BIBO PLB as part of a startup team: we join as product + tech + growth partner, help build the MVP, and participate in hypothesis testing, UX, analytics and go-to-market.

products.label: Platform products
products.title: What we have already built
products.reputar_desc: AI reputation management service for social networks and messengers.
products.reputar_value: Faster response times, standardised communication, reduced losses from negative feedback.
products.mooly_desc: AI monitoring of real estate listings across social networks and messengers.
products.mooly_value: Time savings, content deduplication, wide source coverage.
products.gedell_desc: AI analysis of investment attractiveness of real estate in Dubai.
products.raven_desc: AI service for reducing information overload.
products.raven_value: Time savings and reduced information load.

process.label: How we work
process.title: Four steps from idea to product
process.step1_text: We study the task, context, audience and competitive landscape.
process.step2_text: We form a solution hypothesis and product architecture.
process.step3_text: We assemble the MVP, AI service or module in real conditions.
process.step4_text: We launch, test, and improve iteratively.

trust.label: Why teams trust us
trust.title: The case for BIBO PLB
trust.point2: Experience across product, growth, coding and AI
trust.point4: Ability to work in conditions of uncertainty
trust.point5: Flexible model: from staff augmentation to partnership

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's discuss your project
contact.promise3: We'll map a realistic launch path
contact.task_placeholder: Briefly describe what needs to be done
contact.success: Request sent! We'll be in touch shortly.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.description: AI Product Platform for founders and companies. We launch, test and scale digital products.
